title: India's AI talent can earn ₹60 lakh a year. Here's which skills pay the most
description: Artificial intelligence skills are commanding some of the highest salaries in India's technology sector, with experienced Generative AI engineers earning an average of ₹60 lakh a year. A new 1 Finance report shows that GCCs are driving demand for AI, cybersecurity and cloud professionals, creating a new class of high-paying jobs.
content: Artificial intelligence is creating a new class of highly paid professionals in India, with experienced Generative AI engineers now earning average salaries of ₹60 lakh a year, according to a study by 1 Finance. The report highlights how Global Capab... [3565 chars]

title: Geopolitical crises, economic cooperation, artificial intelligence to be key focus areas of G7 meet in France: Sources
description: The 52nd G7 Summit in Evian, France, will focus on geopolitical crises, economic cooperation, AI, and developmental partnerships. Discussions will include Ukraine, Middle Eastern countries, and global imbalances with invited nations like India. Key themes are concrete measures, reconvergence, and international action on ongoing crises.

title: Former xAI engineer sues company over AI safety concerns, claims he was laid off for speaking up
description: A former xAI engineer has accused Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company of dismissing him after he repeatedly warned about the risks posed by Grok. The lawsuit paints a picture of internal clashes over AI safety, allegations of regulatory shortcuts, and disagreements over the race to superintelligence.

title: Satya Nadella says AI backlash is real but predicts higher wages and broader prosperity
description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella sees the backlash against artificial intelligence in the US, but believes it will ultimately have a positive impact on society and wages.
